title: mutisia ochrocalyx
intro: Mutisia ochrocalyx, also known as yellow-leaved mutisia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is used in traditional medicine in the Andean region, where its roots and leaves are believed to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including the ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Mutisia ochrocalyx is typically used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
